sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { useFormik } from 'formik'; import './App.css'; import Main from './main'; import { BrowserRouter, Route, Routes, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Formik, Form, Field } from 'formik'; import * as Yup from 'yup'; // Validation schema const validationSchema = Yup.object().shape({ Name: Yup.string().required('Full Name is required'), Address: Yup.string().required('Address is required'), mobile: Yup.string().required('Mobile Number is required'), city: Yup.string().required('City is required'), district: Yup.string().required('District is required'), census: Yup.string().required('Census Code is required'), feeder: Yup.string().required('Feeder Code is required'), subdivision: Yup.string().required('Subdivision Name is required'), routecode: Yup.string().required('Route Code is required'), billmonth: Yup.string().required('Bill Month is required'), billdate: Yup.string().required('Bill Date is required'), duedate: Yup.string().required('Due Date is required'), fromdate: Yup.string().required('From Date is required'), todate: Yup.string().required('To Date is required'), consumerno: Yup.string().required('Consumer No is required'), meterno: Yup.string().required('Meter No is required'), maxdemand: Yup.string().required('Max Demand is required'), feedercode: Yup.string().required('Feeder Code is required'), meterrentcode: Yup.string().required('Meter Rent Code is required'), unitcr: Yup.string().required('Unit (current reading) is required'), unitpr: Yup.string().required('Unit (past reading) is required'), unitc: Yup.string().required('Unit (consumption) is required'), reactiveunitcr: Yup.string().required('Reactive Unit(current reading) is required'), reactiveunitpr: Yup.string().required('Reactive Unit(past reading) is required'), reactiveunitc: Yup.string().required('Reactive Unit(consumption) is required'), importcr: Yup.string().required('Import(current reading) is required'), importpr: Yup.string().required('Import(past reading) is required'), importc: Yup.string().required('Import(consumption) is required'), exportcr: Yup.string().required('Export(current reading) is required'), exportpr: Yup.string().required('Export(past reading) is required'), exportc: Yup.string().required('Export(consumption) is required'), security: Yup.string().required('Security Deposit is required'), hpkw: Yup.string().required('HP/KW is required'), fixedcharge: Yup.string().required('Fixed Charge is required'), energycharge: Yup.string().required('Energy Charge is required'), mincharge: Yup.string().required('Minimum Charge is required'), reactivecharge: Yup.string().required('Reactive Charge is required'), toucharge: Yup.string().required('TOU Charge is required'), fuelcharge: Yup.string().required('Fuel Charge is required'), eleduty: Yup.string().required('Electricity Duty is required'), meterrent: Yup.string().required('Meter Rent is required'), fmc: Yup.string().required('Fuse misc. Charge is required'), dpc: Yup.string().required('DPC is required'), tamt: Yup.string().required('Total AMT is required'), pbill: Yup.string().required('Provisional Bill is required'), discreb: Yup.string().required('Discount/Rebate is required'), totalamt1: Yup.string().required('Total amount is required'), arrears: Yup.string().required('Arrears is required'), solarpr: Yup.string().required('Solar purchase rate is required'), solarbc: Yup.string().required('Solar banking charge is required'), totalamt2: Yup.string().required('Total amount is required'), govtrelief: Yup.string().required('Govt. Relief is required'), totalamt3: Yup.string().required('Total amount is required'), totalpayment: Yup.string().required('Total Payment is required'), adjustment: Yup.string().required('Adjustment is required'), fpppa: Yup.string().required('Tariff/fpppa Adjustment is required'), totalamt4: Yup.string().required('Total Bill Amt is required'), theft: Yup.string().required('Theft Arrears is required'), litigation: Yup.string().required('Litigation Arrears is required'), month1: Yup.string().required('Month 1 is required'), month2: Yup.string().required('Month 2 is required'), month3: Yup.string().required('Month 3 is required'), unitmonth1: Yup.string().required('Unit of Month 1 is required'), unitmonth2: Yup.string().required('Unit of Month 2 is required'), unitmonth3: Yup.string().required('Unit of Month 3 is required'), amountmonth1: Yup.string().required('Amount of Month 1 is required'), amountmonth2: Yup.string().required('Amount of Month 2 is required'), amountmonth3: Yup.string().required('Amount of Month 3 is required'), }); const SignupForm = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const formik = useFormik({ initialValues: { Name: '', Address: '', mobile: '', city: '', district: '', census: '', feeder: '', subdivision: '', routecode: '', billmonth: '', billdate: '', duedate: '', fromdate: '', todate: '', consumerno: '', meterno: '', maxdemand: '', feedercode: '', meterrentcode: '', unitcr: '', unitpr: '', unitc: '', reactiveunitcr: '', reactiveunitpr: '', reactiveunitc: '', importcr: '', importpr: '', importc: '', exportcr: '', exportpr: '', exportc: '', security: '', hpkw: '', fixedcharge: '', energycharge: '', mincharge: '', reactivecharge: '', toucharge: '', fuelcharge: '', eleduty: '', meterrent: '', fmc: '', dpc: '', tamt: '', pbill: '', discreb: '', totalamt1: '', arrears: '', solarpr: '', solarbc: '', totalamt2: '', govtrelief: '', totalamt3: '', totalpayment: '', adjustment: '', fpppa: '', totalamt4: '', theft: '', litigation: '', month1: '', month2: '', month3: '', unitmonth1: '', unitmonth2: '', unitmonth3: '', amountmonth1: '', amountmonth2: '', amountmonth3: '', }, validationSchema: validationSchema, onSubmit: (values) => { navigate('/main', { state: values }); }, }); return (

); }; export default function App() { return ( } /> } /> ); }
